patch.value: Extend pm package init --declarative to the full capability matrix (hooks/search/importers/schema/renderers/parser/preflight/services)

Follow-up to the commands-only --declarative blueprint starter (pm-8mxg). Generalize the declarative scaffold so every --capability variant can emit its composeExtension(blueprint) form (mapping each surface to its ExtensionBlueprint field: hooks->hooks.afterCommand, search->searchProviders/vectorStoreAdapters, importers->importers/exporters, schema->itemTypes/itemFields/migrations, renderers->renderers record, parser->parsers record, preflight->preflights, services->services record) plus the matching author-time assertExtensionPreflight test. Requires a shared per-capability registration-definition builder so the imperative activate body and the declarative blueprint stay in lockstep (the current README define* snippet uses simplified run bodies that do not match the real registrations, so it cannot be reused verbatim). Scoped out of pm-8mxg to keep that PR focused, reviewable, and 100%-coverable.

## Implementation (branch feat/declarative-capability-matrix)

Generalized `pm package init --declarative` from commands-only to the full 9-capability matrix.

**Shared per-capability registration-definition builder** (`src/cli/commands/extension/scaffold.ts`):
- `buildDeclarativeBlueprintSurface(extensionName, commandName, capability)` → `{ builderImports, definitions, blueprintFields }` — the single source the declarative entrypoint AND its colocated test both read from, so the two never drift. Maps each surface to its `ExtensionBlueprint` field in `composeExtension` registration order: hooks→`hooks.afterCommand`, search→`searchProviders`/`vectorStoreAdapters`, importers→`importers`/`exporters` (with `options.flags`), schema→`itemTypes`/`itemFields`/`migrations`, renderers→`renderers`, parser→`parsers`, preflight→`preflights`, services→`services`.
- `buildDeclarativePingCommandLines` — shared starter-command body (parser variant adds `--shout`/`--upper` flags + surfaces `upper`).
- `buildDeclarativeCapabilityTestBlock` — per-capability harness test (`ext.assert*`/`ext.run*`) mirroring the imperative `buildSampleTestSource` blocks.
- Generalized `buildDeclarativeEntrypoint` / `buildDeclarativeSampleTestSource` / `buildDeclarativePackageReadme` to take `capability`. Removed the `declarative && resolvedCapability !== "commands"` guard (package-mode guard kept).

**Preflight capability literal**: the declarative test asserts `report.capabilities` against the DERIVED + SORTED set (`JSON.stringify([...SCAFFOLD_MANIFEST_CAPABILITIES[cap]].sort())`), which equals the synthesized manifest caps. Importers sort to `["commands","importers","schema"]`.

**Wiring**: register-setup + completion (bash/zsh/fish) help text "package-mode, commands capability" → "package-mode, any capability"; docs/SDK.md two stale "commands-only" passages updated. No new flags/commands → no cli-contracts/full.json change.

**Manual e2e (temp dir, all 9 capabilities)**: scaffolded each declarative package, linked the host SDK, ran `tsc --noEmit` + `node --test` → 9/9 typecheck OK, 9/9 test suites pass (e.g. search package runs 3 real tests: preflight + harness command + search primitives). Plus an in-suite install+dispatch e2e for the search capability.

**Surfaced + fixed**: pm-v3ty (deriveExtensionCapabilities schema under-grant for importer/exporter options.flags). **Filed**: pm-zqes (broader describeExtensionBlueprint importer-with-options parity gap, deferred).

Done: pm package init --declarative now scaffolds the composeExtension blueprint form for all 9 capabilities (commands/hooks/search/importers/schema/renderers/parser/preflight/services) via the shared buildDeclarativeBlueprintSurface builder, each with a matching assertExtensionPreflight + createExtensionTestHarness test. Removed the commands-only guard; help text + docs updated. Manual e2e: 9/9 declarative packages typecheck + node --test pass; in-suite install/dispatch e2e for search. 100% coverage (5060 tests). Surfaced+fixed pm-v3ty; filed pm-zqes.

Generalized the three declarative builders (entrypoint/test/README) over a shared buildDeclarativeBlueprintSurface so every --capability emits its composeExtension blueprint form with a matching assertExtensionPreflight + createExtensionTestHarness test. Removed the commands-only guard; updated register-setup/completion/docs. Verified by 9/9 manual typecheck+node --test e2e and a search install/dispatch spec; 100% coverage.
pm package init --declarative --capability <any> scaffolds a runnable composeExtension blueprint starter whose generated test compiles and passes.
Delivered for all 9 capabilities; the prior commands-only restriction is removed.
